'''Jerris Rudd''' was a henchman of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Biography==
Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Rudd and [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] purchased and trained two [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancers, [[Oola/Legends|Oola]] and [[Sienn'rha]], for the enjoyment of Jabba. He hired Rudd to transport the dancers from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>. Before he could present Jabba with his gifts, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] spotted Rudd and the two Twi'leks. While Rudd wasn't looking, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] offered the dancers their freedom. Before they could accept the offer, Rudd noticed Luke and fired several shots at him. Using his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Luke quickly defeated Rudd, who was left for dead.
